description: deal with agreed figures and structured terms produces a complete draft
assertions: subtotal 3000.00 and total 2750.00 as exact-decimal strings
payment_due_date derived net-30 from the anchor, not weekend-rolled
status is draft and human_review_required is true
the boundary line and consequential-action gate precede any send

description: figures absent from the record become gaps, never estimates
assertions: a missing_amount gap names the line
a missing_terms gap says to normalize payment terms first
no figure is estimated from benchmarks or adjacent deals
the draft states it is incomplete

description: write request with flags off refuses the write but returns the draft
assertions: _gate names the off flag and its degraded_behavior pointer
no file is written under pipeline/finance/
the computed draft is still returned in full
invoice_refs on the deal is NOT updated

description: issued invoice freezes terms; later deal edits do not change it
assertions: terms_snapshot equals the deal's payment_terms_structured at build time
editing the deal's terms afterward does not mutate the issued record
